name: Grits Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 3-1/2 cups of milk to a boil in a medium saucepan.
2. Gradually stir in the grits.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thick (about 10 minutes).
4. Remove from heat. Add butter and garlic cheese; stir until melted.
5. Stir in eggs and remaining milk.
6. Pour into a 2-quart casserole.
7. Bake in a preheated 375 degree oven uncovered for 30 minutes.
8. Sprinkle grated cheese over top.
9. Bake an additional 15 minutes longer.
